author: National Geographic YouTube
text:
Keeping a Mole Alive (Full Episode) | Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies | National Geographic
Who is CIA Officer Patrick Weninger? During one of the most tense periods of conflict in history in the Middle East, he faces the ultimate test of trust. Recruiting a mole inside al-Qaida is only the beginning; the real challenge is keeping him alive. Intelligence alone won’t win the battle. The true test lies in safeguarding the life of a man who holds the key to countless operations. As danger closes in from every direction, loyalty, strategy and courage collide in a fight for survival in this full episode of Inside the CIA from National Geographic.

Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies | S1 E2
